name: rtk
description: Claude Code plugin for installing Rust Token Killer.

interface.shortDescription: Install RTK and initialize its Claude Code integration.
interface.longDescription: Installs the RTK CLI and runs the global Claude Code init step so Claude Code can use RTK for token reduction.
defaultPrompt: Use the rtk-install skill to install RTK for Claude Code on this machine, run the global init step `rtk init -g`, and verify that `~/.claude/RTK.md` was created.
